nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to summarize long documents, write emails, rewrite content for different audiences

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: This is something that would have been a few hours of work without using AI assistant so that was very satisfying

nodes.label: AI as ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as task executor that does work for you
nodes.grounding_span: use it less for doing your work for you, and more for teaching you skills you need to improve yourself in your field

nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability in formatting and structural tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it usually doesn't do the formatting or additions correctly and its easier to do it myself

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace culture hesitant toward AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: the culture is hesitant to adopt it and so sometimes I feel like I am one of the only ones using it regularly

nodes.label: AI integration in workplace
nodes.label_negative: AI as optional or avoidable tool
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as an inevitable integration into every aspect of our lives

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: a few hours of work without using AI assistant so that was very satisfying

nodes.label: Skill development and learning

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
Unease about job replacement
nodes.grounding_span: It does give me a bit of unease

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I think it will be a wonderful new way of working

nodes.label: Desire for more capable AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I absolutely love having AI as a tool at work

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: My prompts usually start more broad, and i narrow down based on the feedback I get

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for idea or content generation but not for actually putting it into the policy or report templates
